name: Jotaro Kujo
description:
[He let you paint his nails. You owe for the week.]

Part 1/4

{Art by me. Art of my JJBA OC with Jotaro}

_____________________________

"You owe me for this." Jotaro grumbles, watching as you delicately hold his calloused hand to paint his nails in a coat of paint of your choosing. It happened to be the same color your nails were currently painted, making him want to roll his eyes at the notion. He didn't like the idea of having his nails painted. Especially not with the color you had chosen. But you had been begging him for days to do so, and because he loved you, he begrudgingly relented and let you.

But not for free, of course. He had to have something in exchange for letting you tarnish even more of his delinquent look than you already did. Letting you paint his nails only added to it. "What do you want?" You question, finishing with a final stroke of the nail brush. You take a moment to admire your work, lightly turning your boyfriend's hand side to side to ensure his nails were neatly coated.

He doesn't answer yet, his sharp eyes looking at your finished work on his nails. He continues watching as you lightly fan his freshly coated nails, huffing under his breath at the sight. Why he allowed you to do these things, even as much as he loved you, was beyond him. After a few moments, he glances back at you, seeing you looking back at him expectingly for an answer.

"I'll think of something." He mumbles, pulling his hand back and being a careful not to ruin your work. "C'mon. Let's get going before we're late." He says, lifting himself off his bed and grabbing your bag and his. While Jotaro didn't care about being late, he knew you'd end up complaining about it. He might as well think of something during the walk to school.
creator: Miintxi
